evals.prompt: create a landing page for a small coffee shop using design studio
evals.expected_output: Plan artifacts written; design→implement→evaluate cycle attempted; DesignAgent not given source code; serve.json after implement.
assertions: Design agent context does not include HTML/CSS/JS source files
After implement, harness-output/serve.json exists with port and path

evals.prompt: build a multi-section marketing site for a design tool with hero, problem, process, and install sections
evals.expected_output: Spec identifies multiple sections or zones; evaluation uses browser automation.
assertions: spec mentions multiple sections or expected zones
evaluator path uses browser automation not code-only review

evals.prompt: evaluate the current design at harness-output/site against the sprint contract
evals.expected_output: Evaluator produces critique and/or scores without judging from source code.
assertions: evaluation does not treat reading HTML/CSS as the scoring basis

evals.prompt: write CSS for a centered hero with three feature cards
evals.expected_output: Near-miss: should not start the full 4-agent studio loop as a pure CSS tweak.
assertions: skill either does not activate or agent does not start full 4-agent loop

evals.prompt: polish this landing page at harness-output/site — audit only, no redesign
evals.expected_output: Review lane; loads polish; does not start Plan/Design/Builder loop; writes harness-output/review/report.md.
assertions: no requirement that design-description-*.md be newly created for this run

evals.prompt: overhaul the site at ./site — raise originality, keep IA
assertions: overhaul/plan path engaged (baseline or overhaul leaf / studio loop)
